publicationStmt.authority: HANSEL: Human-Accessible NLP-ready Sanskrit E-text Library

p.ref: Distributed by HANSEL under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

licence.p:
Under this licence, you are free to:
Share — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format.
Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the material.

list.item: Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.
NonCommercial — You may not use the material for commercial purposes.
ShareAlike — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.
No additional restrictions — You may not apply legal terms or technological measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

licence.p: See the Creative Commons site for full details.
HANSEL assumes no responsibility for unauthorised use that infringes rights.

notesStmt.note: Ratnāvalī (“Precious Garland”) is a five-chapter work traditionally attributed to Nāgārjuna, composed in 500 didactic verses addressed to a king. It combines ethical instruction, political counsel, and the Madhyamaka analysis of emptiness, presenting Buddhist practice as concerned both with worldly welfare (abhyudaya) and with ultimate liberation (naiḥśreyasa). The opening sections distinguish these two aims, while later portions develop explicitly bodhisattva-oriented commitments and sustained reflections on the conduct and responsibilities of rulership. Rather than functioning as a purely technical treatise on emptiness, the text brings philosophical insight and practical governance into deliberate conversation, grounding compassion, generosity, and nonviolence in the recognition that self, power, and kingdom lack intrinsic existence. Long transmitted through Tibetan and Chinese translations (including the Indian commentary of Ajitamitra), the work has recently acquired renewed textual interest with the surfacing of a complete Sanskrit manuscript in Tibet. That manuscript forms the basis of the present edition and the electronic text made available here. Thorough peer review of the edition and the underlying manuscript are still a desideratum.

bibl.title: Ratnāvalī: Critical Edition of the Sanskrit Manuscript from Xizang [梵文写本《宝鬘论颂》校勘与研究]

imprint.publisher: Tibet Tibetan Ancient Books Publishing House [西藏藏文古籍出版社]

series.title: Palm-Leaf Scripture Special Text Excavation Series [贝叶经特殊文本专项挖掘系列丛书]

editorialDecl.p: I (Tyler Neill) produced this HANSEL edition by copying embedded text from the posted PDF, then processing to remove extraneous material, followed by thorough proofreading and structuring for HANSEL. The text should be fully in line with the edition.

The source edition is printed in Devanāgarī; the electronic text uses lossless IAST transliteration. IAST differs slightly from ISO 15919; conversion can be achieved via:
ṛ → r̥
ḷ → l̥
ḻ → ḷ
ṃ → ṁ
e → ē
o → ō

Corrections and uncertainties:
Replacement: before after
Deletion:
Addition:
Unclear:

revisionDesc.change: Extracted text from PDF, processed for HANSEL.

lg.l: vakṣyāmi dharmaḥ siddhiṃ hi yāti saddharmabhājane ||
sukham abhyudayas tatra mokṣo naiḥśreyaso mataḥ |
śrāddhatvād bhajate dharmaṃ prājñatvād vetti tattvataḥ |
prajñā pradhānaṃ tv anayoḥ śraddhā pūrvaṅgamāsya tu ||
chandād dveṣād bhayān mohād yo dharmaṃ nātivartate |
sa śrāddha iti vijñeyaḥ śreyaso bhājanaṃ param ||
kāyavāṅmānasaṃ karma sarvaṃ samyak parīkṣya yaḥ |
parātmahitam ājñāya sadā kuryāt sa paṇḍitaḥ ||
ete karmapathāḥ śuklā daśa kṛṣṇā viparyayāt ||
pūjyapūjā ca maitrī ca dharma eṣa samāsataḥ ||
śarīratāpanād dharmaḥ kevalān nāsti yat tataḥ |
manorathān hanty abhidhyā vyāpādo bhayadaḥ smṛtaḥ |
phalam etan manuṣyatve sarvebhyaḥ prāk ca durgatiḥ ||
lobho dveṣaś ca mohaś ca tajjaṃ karmeti cāśubham |
alobhādveṣāmohāś ca tajjaṃ karma ca tac chubham ||
nivṛttir aśubhāt kṛtsnāt pravṛttis tu śubhe sadā |
kāyena manasā vācā dharmo 'yaṃ dvividhaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
nāsmy ahaṃ na bhaviṣyāmi na me 'sti na bhaviṣyati |
asty ahaṃ mama cāstīti mithyaitat paramārthataḥ |
bījaṃ yasyānṛtaṃ tasya prarohaḥ satyataḥ kutaḥ ||
dṛśyate nāma tac caivam na kiṃcid api tattvataḥ ||
na ca kaścit sa tattvena svamukhapratibimbavat ||
na dṛśyate tathā skandhān anādāyāham ity api ||
skandhagrāho yāvad asmāt tāvad evāham ity api |
ahaṃkāre sati punaḥ karma janma tataḥ punaḥ ||
ahaṃkāraḥ kṣayaṃ yāti tataḥ karma ca janma ca ||
evaṃ hetuphalotpādaṃ paśyaṃs tatkṣayam eva ca |
nāstitām astitāṃ caiva naiti lokasya tattvataḥ ||
na bhaviṣyati nirvāṇe sarvam etan na te bhayam |
ucyamāna ihābhāvas tasya te kiṃ bhayaṃkaraḥ ||
mokṣe nātmā na ca skandhā mokṣaś ced īdṛśaḥ priyaḥ |
ātmaskandhāpanayanaṃ kim ihaiva na te priyam ||
na cābhāvo 'pi nirvāṇaṃ kuta evāsya bhāvatā |
samāsād astitādṛṣ t ṭ iḥ phalaṃ cāstīti karmaṇām |
durgateḥ sugateś cāsmāt sa mokṣaḥ sadbhir ucyate ||
astitām api nopaiti nirodhaṃ saha hetunā ||
asmin satīdaṃ bhavati dīrghe hrasvaṃ yathā sati |
hrasve 'sati punar dīrghaṃ na bhavaty asvabhāvataḥ |
marīcir yadi vāri syād āsannaiḥ kiṃ na dṛśyate ||
marīcis toyasadṛśī yathā nāmbho na cārthataḥ |
marīciṃ toyam ity etad iti matvā gato 'trasan |
yadi nāstīti tat toyaṃ gṛhṇīyān mūḍha eva saḥ ||
nāstīti cāpi moho 'yaṃ sati mohe na mucyate ||
nāstiko durgatiṃ yāti sugatiṃ yāti cāstikaḥ |
nāstitāṃ labhate mohāt kasmān na labhate 'stitām ||
na pratijñā na caritaṃ na cittaṃ bodhiniśrayāt |
nāstikatve 'rthato yeṣāṃ kathaṃ te nāstikāḥ smṛṭāḥ ||
viddhi gambhīram ity uktaṃ buddhānāṃ śāsanāmṛtam ||
vibhavaṃ naiti nāyāti na tiṣṭhaty api ca kṣaṇam |
dvayor apy āgatigatī yat sthitiś ca na tattvataḥ |
sthiter abhāvād udayo nirodhaś ca na tattvataḥ |
uditaś ca sthitaś ceti niruddhaś ca kuto 'rthataḥ ||
katham aksaṇiko bhāvaḥ pariṇāmaḥ sadā yadi |
nāsti cet pariṇāmaḥ syād anyathātvaṃ kuto 'rthataḥ ||
ekadeśe kṣayād vā syāt kṣaṇikaṃ sarvaśo 'pi vā |
sthairyād akṣaṇike cāpi kutaḥ kācit purāṇatā ||
tryātmakatvāt kṣaṇasyaivaṃ na lokasya kṣaṇaṃ sthitiḥ ||
vinaikam api nāneko nāstitvam api cāstitām ||
vināśāt pratipakṣād vā syād astitvasya nāstitā |
vināśaḥ pratipakṣo vā kathaṃ syād astyasaṃbhavāt ||
nirvṛtes tena lokasya nopaity ūnatvam arthataḥ |
antavān iti lokaś ca pṛṣṭas tūṣṇīṃ jino 'bhavat ||
sarvajña iti sarvajño budhais tenaiva gamyate |
tathā kuru yathā rājaṃs tair naṣṭair nopanāśyase ||
na bhūmiḥ puruśo nāpo na tejo nānilo na kham |
na vijñānaṃ na sarvāṇi tebhyo 'nyaḥ ko 'sty ataḥ pumān ||
ṣaḍdhātuḥ puruṣo yadvat saṃghātatvān na tattvataḥ |
dhātur apy evam ekaikaḥ saṃghātatvān na tattvataḥ ||
nātmā skandhā na te tasmin na sa teṣu na tair vinā |
nāpy agnīndhanavan miśraḥ skandhair astīty ataḥ katham ||
bhūr na bhūtatrayaṃ nāsyāṃ neyaṃ tatra na tair vinā |
ekaikam evam ity asmād bhūtāny apy ātmavan mṛṣā ||
ekaikaṃ yad vinā nāsti tribhir ekena ca trayam ||
ekaikaṃ yad vinā nāsti tribhir ekena ca trayaṃ |
pratisvam asatām eṣāṃ saṃghāto jāyate kathaṃ ||
atha pratisvaṃ vidyante kiṃ nāsty agnir vinendhanam |
atha agnir apratisvo 'yaṃ pratisvaṃ tat kathaṃ trayam |
pratisvam asatāṃ caiṣāṃ kathaṃ sattā parasparāt ||
yatraikaṃ tatra śiṣṭāni pratisvaṃ santi naiva cet |
varṇagandharasasparśā ye teṣām apy ayaṃ nayaḥ |
anidarśanaṃ ca vijñānam anantaṃ sarvataḥ prabhuḥ |
atrāpaḥ pṛthivī caiva tejo vāyur na gāhate ||
atra hrasvaṃ ca dīrghaṃ cāṇusthūlaṃ śubhāśubham |
atra nāma ca rūpaṃ ca niḥśeṣam avarudhyate ||
etat sarvaṃ yad ajñānād vijñāne pūrvam utthitam |
vijñāna eva tad jñānād evaṃ paścān nirudhyate ||
yadā na labhate bhāvam evābhāvaṃ tadā kutaḥ ||
bhūtair vinā kuto rūpaṃ nāmamātratvam apy asat ||
cintyāny ātmavad ity asmād dhātuṣaṭkam anātmakam ||
na kiṃcit puruṣas tadvat pāṭitaḥ saha dhātubhiḥ ||
sarvadharmā anātmāna ity asmād bhāṣitaṃ jinaiḥ |
dhātuṣaṭkaṃ ca taiḥ sarvaṃ nirṇītaṃ tac ca nārthataḥ ||
naivam ātmā na cānātmā yāthābhūtena labhyate |
dṛṣṭaśrutādyaṃ muninā na satyaṃ na mṛṣoditam |
pakṣād dhi pratipakṣaḥ syād ubhayaṃ tac ca nārthataḥ ||
asmād eva ca tattvena nopaity asti ca nāsti ca ||
yac caivaṃ sarvathā neti sarvajñas tat kathaṃ vadet |
sāntam ity athavānantaṃ dvayaṃ vādvayam eva vā ||
asaṃkhyeyā gatā buddhās tathaiṣyanty atha sāṃpratāḥ |
koṭyagraśaś ca sattvāntas tebhyas traikālyajo mataḥ ||
etat tad dharmagāmbhīryaṃ yat tad guhyaṃ pṛthagjane |
māyāgajasya dṛśyeta yathā janmānta eva ca |
na ca kaścit sa tattvena janmāntaś caiva vidyate ||
māyopamasya lokasya tathā janmānta eva ca |
dṛśyate paramārthena na ca janmānta eva ca ||
yathā māyāgajo naiti kutaścid yāti na kvacit |
tathā māyopamo loko naiti yāti na kutracit |
yo 'sti nāsty athavāpi syād anyatra vyavahārataḥ ||
buddhena hetor nānyasmād ayam avyākṛtaḥ kṛtaḥ ||
satataṃ dṛśyamānāpi yadā citte na tiṣṭhati ||
durjñānam atigāmbhīryāt jñātvā dharmam imaṃ janaiḥ ||
samyagjñātena tu sukhaṃ bodhiṃ cāpnoty anuttarām ||
tasmād atra pratikṣepaṃ dṛṣṭiṃ tyaktvā ca nāstikīm |
tataḥ śubhāśubhaṃ karma tato janma śubhāśubham ||
dharmāt kīrtiḥ sukhaṃ caiva neha bhīr na mumūrṣataḥ |
paraloke sukhaṃ sphītaṃ tasmād dharmaṃ sadā bhaja ||
dharma eva parā nītir dharmāl loko 'bhirajyate |
rañjitena hi lokena neha nāmutra vañcyate ||
adharmeṇa tu yā nītis tayā loko 'parajyate |
ripor apriyam anvicchan doṣāṃs tyaktvā guṇān śraya |
svahitāvāptir evaṃ te ripoś cāpy apriyaṃ bhavet ||
ebhir ācara lokasya dharmasyaiva ca saṃgraham ||
viśvāsaṃ janayaty ekaṃ satyaṃ rājñāṃ yathā dṛḍham |
na visaṃvādavat satyaṃ na bhāvodgatam arthataḥ |
doṣān pracchādayaty ekas tyāgo rājñāṃ yathojjvalaḥ |
gauravād dīptir ājñā ca tasmād upaśamaṃ bhaja ||
sahāsīnasya satataṃ prajñā dharmaś ca vardhate ||
pathyam apy apriyaṃ tasmāt jñātvā śīghraṃ samācara |
pibed auṣadham apy ugram ārogyāyātmavān iva ||
avaśyaṃ maraṇaṃ paśyan pāpād duḥkhaṃ mṛtasya ca |
aihikena sukhenāpi na pāpaṃ kartum arhasi ||
kasmiṃ cid abhayaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ bhayaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ kvacit kṣaṇe |
yady ekasmin samāśvāsaḥ kim ekasmin na te bhayam ||
akāryakaraṇam mohāt madyaṃ tyajyaṃ ataḥ sadā ||
na caivaṃ strīśarīre 'sti svalpam apy arthataḥ śubhaṃ ||
strīṇām apaśyan saṃmūḍhas tac charīreṣu rajyate ||
rajyate hi tathā lokaḥ strīṣu mohād ajānakaḥ ||
teṣv eva rajyate loko vairāgyaṃ kena nīyatām ||
vivaraṃ taj janair mūḍhai ratyartham upakalpitam ||
yaḥ śayīta sa nārīṇāṃ śayīta jaghanodare ||
virūpaṃ vā surūpaṃ vā vṛddhaṃ taruṇam eva vā |
sarvaṃ strīrūpam aśuci kva te rāgo viśeṣataḥ ||
yady apy amedhyaṃ varṇāḍhyaṃ sukumāraṃ susaṃsthitam |
tathāpy ayuktas tadrāgaḥ strīrūpe sarvathā tathā ||
svabhāvaṃ kuṇapasyāsya kathaṃ paśyam na paśyasi ||
tvag apy amedhyā na jyeyā vastrakañcukavat sthitā |
kathaṃ hy amedhyapuñjasya tvag medhyā sambhaviṣyasi ||
kutsitaṃ yady amedhyaṃ te kāyo 'yaṃ kiṃ na kutsitaḥ |
na jugupsasy amedhyaṃ kiṃ rūpaṃ svaparayos tathā ||
yathā strīrūpam aśuci svarūpam iti te tathā |
nanu yukto virāgo 'smād bahiradhyātmam eva ca ||
kāyasyāśucitāṃ naiti kathāṃ te kiṃ kariṣyati ||
aho maurkhyam aho dhaurtyam aho paribhavo jane |
kaṇḍuyan sukhito bhavan niṣkaṇḍus tu tataḥ sukhī |
tadvat kāmī sukhī loke niṣkāmaś ca tataḥ sukhī ||
yady apy evaṃ vimṛśaṭo vairāgyaṃ te na setsyati |
āyur alpaṃ bhayaṃ duḥkhaṃ tīvrā nārakakāraṇā |
dhig astu taṃ yam āgamya saṃtrasyanti śarīriṇaḥ |
bhadraṃ tasya yam āgamya pramodante śarīriṇaḥ |
tasmād adharmam utsṛjya bhaja dharmam atandritaḥ |
ātmano 'sya ca lokasya kā m ṃ kṣa bodhim anuttarām ||
mūlaṃ tasyāḥ sthiraṃ cittaṃ bodhau śailendrarājavat |
dharmaṃ pratisamādānaṃ kuru rājan sadā sthiram |
dāsyāmi yācitaṃ svārthaṃ santaṃ kṣipram iti vratāt |
ity etāni samāsena dvātriṃśat saha hetubhiḥ |
śuddhiṃ kāntiṃ ca dīptiṃ ca buddhānāṃ nopayānti tu ||
syāt tu lakṣaṇaṃ sāmānyaṃ buddhānāṃ cakravartibhiḥ |
kṛtsnasya yac ca lokasya puṇyaṃ loka ivāmitam ||
yat sarvaromakūpāṇāṃ puṇyaṃ janakam ity ataḥ |
tāvatā tāvatā rājan puṇyenaikaikam apy alaṃ |
anuvyañjanam ity evam aśītir yāvad udgatā ||
ity aprameyaṃ leśena puṇyam uktaṃ prameyavat |
buddhānāṃ dharmakāyasya hetur meyas tathā katham ||
hetur alpo 'pi sarvasya vistīrṇaṃ janayet phalaṃ |
bodhihetāv ameye tu meyacintā kutaḥ phale ||
puṇyaṃ jñānaṃ ca saṃkṣepād ity ajasram idaṃ bhaja ||
ānantyam evam eveṣṭaṃ sattvānām api duḥkhinām ||
puṇyaṃ sthitasya tasyaivaṃ jāgrataḥ svapato 'pi vā |
ameyāṃ bodhim ākāṅkṣann ameyaṃ kurute śubham ||
saṃbhārair acirād bodhiṃ katham ebhir na lapsyate ||
anantaṃ puṇyam etena jñānaṃ cānantam ity api |
śārīraṃ mānasaṃ caiva kṣipraṃ duḥkham apohati ||
tad asyākurvataḥ pāpaṃ puṇyān nātha bhavaty ataḥ ||
śarīrair mānasair duḥkhair evam atyantam akṣataḥ |
ā bhavād amitaṃ lokam uddharan kiṃ viṣatsyati ||

alpo 'pi duḥkhinaḥ kālo duḥsaho 'tibahuḥ kim n u |
kālo 'nanto 'py aduḥkhasya sukhinaḥ kena bādhakaḥ ||
śarīraduḥkhaṃ naivāsya duḥkhaṃ syāt kena mānasam |
tasmāc cireṇa buddhatvam iti sīden na buddhimān |
lobhadveṣaṃ ca mohaṃ ca doṣān jñātvā parityaja |
lobhāt pretagatiṃ yāti dveṣān narakaṃ gacchati |
kāñcanaṃ ratnajālaṃ ca caityeṣv āropaya svayam ||
kāryā sarañjanīyāś ca sevyā dharmā ṣaḍ ādarāt ||
mā bhūt tatpratyayā bhaktiḥ sadoṣeṣv apy ajānatām ||
satataṃ kuru kāruṇyāt svāthyaṃ caiṣāṃ bhajādarāt ||
chāyāsu prapikāḥ kāryāḥ pūrṇāḥ kalpasya vāriṇaḥ ||
yathāsukhānnaṃ pretebhyaḥ puraḥ paścāc ca bhojanāt |
hiraṇyamātrāṃ ca samām arghayuktāṃ ca kāraya ||
mantriṇaḥ kiṃ vadantīti svayaṃ jñātvā ca sarvataḥ |
yad yal lokahitaṃ sādhyaṃ tat tat sarvaṃ sadā kuru ||
kiṃ kim ātmahitaṃ kuryām iti te 'sti yathādaraḥ |
kiṃ kiṃ lokahitaṃ kuryām iti te 'stu tathādaraḥ ||
muhūrtam api kartavyaṃ svair abhogyaṃ tvam ātmanaḥ ||
dadau kanyāsahasrāṇām aśītiṃ hi muniḥ purā ||
sa tasmai tatkṣaṇaṃ deyo nāsti dānam ataḥparam ||
dātavyaṃ viṣam apy asmai hitaṃ yasya viṣaṃ bhavet |
varānnam apy adeyaṃ syād yasmai tad ahitaṃ bhavet ||
na ratir lokadharmeṣu ratir lokottareṣu ca |
kāryā guṇāḥ samādheyā yathātmani tathā pare ||
gurubhyo dakṣiṇā dāne cādaraḥ kriyatāṃ sadā ||
na kāryā svaguṇaślāghā guṇā vācyā ripor api ||
na marmaghaṭṭanaṃ kāryaṃ na sūcā duṣṭacetasā |
yenāpy avadyo doṣeṇa paraḥ syāt paṇḍitaiḥ sadā |
sa svayaṃ parihartavyaḥ śaktyā vāryaḥ paro 'pi ca ||
svayaṃ cānaparādhī tvaṃ mā bhūd duḥkham ataḥ punaḥ ||
unnatir naiva gantavyā saṃpattyā divyayāpi ca |
rājyabhaṅgo bhaved yasmāt satyān mṛtyur athāpi vā |
tathāpi vacanaṃ vādyaṃ svārthe maunam ato 'nyathā ||
yathā vādī tathā kārī bhaviṣyasi dṛḍhavrataḥ | bhaviṣyasi tataḥ khyātaḥ pramāṇaṃ paramaṃ bhuvi ||
yaśo vitānaṃ vistīrṇaṃ dikṣu sarvāsu jāyate |
bahavaḥ pratyayā mṛtyoḥ katicij jīvatasya tu |
mṛtyor api ta eva syād dharmaḥ kāryas tataḥ sadā ||
satataṃ kurvato dharmaṃ nirvṛtir yaiva jāyate |
lokasya cātmanaś caiva saiva tāvad alaṃ hite ||
sukhaṃ svapiti dharmātmā sukhaṃ ca pratibudhyate |
vratād ā maraṇād asmād devendratvaṃ samāpnuyāt |
karoty adyāpi cendratvaṃ tasmād dharmāsanaṃ bhaja ||
puṇyaṃ mauhūrtikasyaiti na maitrasya kalām api ||
priyo devamanuṣyāṇāṃ bhavaty etaiś ca rakṣyate |
arthān ayatnāl labhate brahmaloke ca jāyate |
maitrīdharmān imān aṣṭau bhuṅkte yadi na mucyate ||
cittāny utpādya sattvānāṃ bodhau kṛtvā sthirāṇi ca |
akṣaṇān śraddhayā naiti śīlād yāti śubhāṃ gatiṃ |
aśaṭhaḥ smṛtim āpnoti matim āpnoti cintakaḥ |
ity evaṃ karmaphalayor jñātvā sārūpyam arthataḥ |
jagaddhitaṃ kuru sadā tad evātmahitaṃ hi te ||
ācaraṃ stūyate yasmāt kṛcchrād vetti kṣamākṣamam ||
anyo 'pi tāvad yaḥ kaścid durvacaḥ kṣemam apriyam |
kim u rājā mahābhaumas tvaṃ mayā bhikṣuṇā satā ||
tvatkṛtād eva tu snehāj jagatām anukampayā |
aham eko vadāmi tvāṃ pathyam apy apriyaṃ bhṛśam ||
vācya ity āha bhagavāṃs tad evam abhidhīyase ||
akrodhe satyavākye ca śrāvyamāṇo 'pi tu sthitaḥ |
tasya me vadato vākyaṃ tvam ihāmutra ca kṣamam |
jñātvā kuru hitāyedam ātmano jagato 'pi ca ||
yācakebhyaḥ purā dānāt prāpyārthāṃś cen na dāsyasi |
iha pathyadanaṃ loke na vahaty abhṛto bhṛtaḥ |
mṛtasyāpy apraśasyatvād rājaṃs tad akṛtaṃ varam ||
dharme niyuktaṃ yāty eva purastāt sarvam eva te ||
kiṃ pūrvakasya dharmāya sukhāya yaśase 'pi vā ||
bhuktād arthād iha sukhaṃ dattāt pāratrikaṃ sukham |
abhuktādattanaṣṭāt tu duḥkham eva kutaḥ sukham ||
vinaśyan sacivair dātum asvātantryān na śakyasi |
sarvasvenāpy ataḥ svasthaḥ śīghraṃ dharmāspadaṃ kuru |
alubdhaṃ paṇḍitaṃ dharmyaṃ kuru teṣām abādhakam ||
nītijñān dhārmikān snigdhān śucīn bhaktān akātarān |
akṣudrāṃs tyāginaḥ śūrān snigdhān sambhoginaḥ sthirān |
kṛtavṛttīn samān snigdhān vṛddhān adhikṛtān kuru ||
pratimāsaṃ ca tebhyas tvaṃ sarvam āyavyayaṃ śṛṇu |
śrutvā dharmādhikārādyaṃ kāryaṃ sarvaṃ svayaṃ vada ||
dharmārthaṃ yadi te rājyaṃ na kīrtyarthaṃ na kāmataḥ |
yathā rājyaṃ ca dharmaś ca bhavet tava tathā śṛṇu ||
sametā bahavo nityaṃ santu te kāryadarśinaḥ ||
kāruṇyārdraḥ sadā bhūtvā tvam anugrahavān bhava ||
pratyahaṃ pañcarātraṃ vā baddhān kṣīṇān vimocaya |
śeṣān api yathāyogaṃ mā kāṃścit naiva mocaya ||
yeṣv amokṣaṇacittaṃ te jāyate teṣv asaṃvaraḥ |
yāvac ca na vimucyeraṃs tāvat syuḥ sukhabandhanāḥ |
kāruṇyāc chāsanaṃ kāryaṃ na dveṣān nārthalipsayā ||
vimṛśya samyag vijñāya praduṣṭān ghātakān api |
svatantraḥ paśya sarvaṃ ca viṣayaṃ cāracakṣuṣā |
nityāpramattaḥ smṛtimān kuru kāryaṃ ca dhārmikam ||
udārair anurūpais tu śeṣān api yathāvidhi ||
mātsyanyāyaś ca te naivaṃ nyāyād rājyaṃ bhaviṣyati |
na cānyāyo na vādharmo dharmaś caivaṃ bhaviṣyati ||
paralokāt tvayā rājyaṃ nānītaṃ nāpi neṣyasi |
dharmāt prāptam ato 'syārthe nādharmaṃ kartum arhasi ||
rājan yathā nārjayasi prayatnaḥ kriyatāṃ tathā ||
rājan yathā nirviśasi prayatnaḥ kriyatāṃ tathā ||
śārīraṃ mānasaṃ caiva sukhadvayam idaṃ matam ||
yadā ca yatra cittaṃ syāt tadā tena sukhaṃ kila |
na kalpayati yad gṛhṇan nāsmāt teṣu tadā sukham ||
jānīte viṣayaṃ yaṃ yaṃ yena yenendriyeṇa ca |
tadā na śeṣaiḥ śeṣāṇi vyarthāny eva yatas tadā ||
ekam arthaṃ vijānāti yady apy ekam ihendriyam |
tad apy arthaṃ vinā vyarthaṃ vyartho 'rtho 'pi ca tad vinā ||
cakṣūrūpe pratītyaivam ukto vijñānasaṃbhava h ḥ ||
saṃparke lakṣaṇābhāvaḥ śeṣeṣv apy eṣa nirṇayaḥ ||
evaṃ dvidhāpi bhūtānāṃ vyarthatvāt saṅgatir vṛthā |
vyarthatvāt saṅgateś caiva rūpaṃ vyartham ato 'rthataḥ ||
duḥkhe viyogatṛṣṇā ca paśyatāṃ muktir ity ataḥ ||
kaḥ paśyatīti cec cittaṃ vyavahāreṇa kathyate |
na hi caittaṃ vinā cittaṃ vyarthatvān na saheṣyate ||
vyartham evaṃ jagan matvā yāthābhūtā nirāspadā |
kevalaṃ tv asya kāruṇyād ā bodher bhavasaṃtatiḥ ||
nirdiṣṭaḥ sa tu saṃmūḍhaiḥ pradviṣṭaiś caiva nindyate ||
guṇākaraṃ mahāyānaṃ tad dveṣī tena dahyate ||
śrāddho 'pi dagdha ity uktaḥ kā cintā dveṣabandhure ||
duḥkhenāpy ahitaṃ hanyād ity ukte kiṃ virudhyate ||
hitaṃ hitamanāḥ kurvan duḥkhenāpy ahitaṃ katham ||
duḥkham apy āyatīpathyaṃ kāryaṃ kim u sukhaṃ hitam |
ātmanaś ca pareṣāṃ ca dharma eṣa sanātanaḥ ||
na mṛṣyate ca yady etat kaṭubhaiṣajyadāyinaḥ |
tataś cikitsakādyāś ca hatā naivaṃ ca yujyate ||
apathyam api yad dṛṣṭaṃ tat pathyaṃ paṇḍitaiḥ kvacit |
uktā yatra mahāyāne kas tan nindet sacetanaḥ ||
mahāyānam atas tasmin kasmād durbhāṣitaṃ vacaḥ ||
te ṣaṭpāramitāgarbhās tasmād bauddham idaṃ vacaḥ ||
deśitas tan mahāyānam ajñānāndhe na mṛṣyate ||
yasmāt tad buddhamāhātmyam acintyaṃ kiṃ na mṛṣyate ||
upekṣayā hi nāpuṇyam dveṣāt pāpaṃ kutaḥ śubham |
buddhair anyat pramāṇaṃ ca ko 'sminn arthe jinādhikaḥ ||
bhāṣitaṃ ca mahāyāne grāhyam asmād vicakṣaṇaiḥ ||
dharma uktaḥ kṛpāgarbhaḥ sa sātmīkriyatāṃ dṛḍham ||
atha lokasya vaidharmyād rājyaṃ dharmeṇa duṣkaram |
mado darpaḥ pramādas tu kuśaleṣv aprayogitā |
mānaḥ punaḥ saptavidhas taṃ vakṣyāmi prabhedataḥ ||
hīnād vādhikam ātmānaṃ samam vā māna ucyate ||
mohād aham iti grāhaḥ so 'smimāna udāhṛtaḥ ||
so 'dhamo māna ity ete saptāpy uktāḥ samāsataḥ ||
śiṅguḥ prakopitasyānyais tat tad yad anuśiñjanam ||
icchepsutā kathaṃ vidyuḥ sadbhūtair māṃ guṇair iti ||
daurvacasyaṃ yad uktaṃ saddharmaṃ nādriyate vacaḥ |
tathā jālapadas ta[d ya]d atyarthaṃ tadguṇoktitā |
sataiva guṇajātena guruṃ kuryuḥ parā iti ||
doṣair etair vinirmukto guṇānāṃ sevate sukhaṃ ||
dānād bhogaḥ sukhaṃ śīlāt kṣāntyāḥ kāntiḥ śramād dyutiḥ |
dhyānāc chāntir mater muktiḥ kṛpā sarvārthasādhanī ||
saptabhiḥ sakalais tv ebhir yugapat pāram āgataiḥ |
daśānām api vaimalyāt prakṛtyā teṣv avasthiteḥ ||
āpadyate nirodhaṃ ca yasmād asyāṃ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe ||
asyāṃ sādhvī matir yasmāt saṃprāpya pratisaṃvidām ||
ity etā bodhisattvānāṃ bhūmayo daśa kīrtitāḥ |
balam ekaikam asyāś ca jagat sarvam ivāmitam ||
etāvatī tu vācyā syād buddhānām aprameyatā |
yadi hetor na dṛśyeta tāvaty evāprameyatā ||
buddhāṃs taddharmasaṃghāṃś ca bodhisattvāṃś ca sarvaśaḥ |
praṇamya śaranaṃ gatvā vande vandyāṃs tathādarāt ||
yad evaṃ kurvataḥ puṇyaṃ yac ca me 'nyakṛtākṛtam |
arogā balavantaḥ syur āyuṣmantaś ca dehinaḥ ||
ahaṃ caibhir guṇair yuktaḥ sarvaiś cānyair alaṃkṛtaḥ |
ye ca kecid bhayodvignāḥ sarvalokeṣu jantavaḥ |
prasannāḥ kupitāḥ svasthā darśanasparśanāc ca me |
vārayeyam nirāpīḍāṃ tān sarvān yugapat sadā ||
prāṇapriyaḥ syāṃ sattvānāṃ te syuḥ priyatamāś ca me |
teṣāṃ pāpaṃ mayi pacyet macchubhaṃ teṣu cākhilaṃ ||
yāvad eko 'py amuktaḥ syāt sattvaḥ kaścid iha kvacit |
tāvat tadarthaṃ tiṣṭheyaṃ bodhiṃ prāpyāpy anuttarām ||
yad evaṃ vadataḥ puṇyaṃ yadi tan mūrtimad bhavet |
uktam etad bhagavatā hetur apy atra dṛśyate |
iti dharmaḥ samākhyātaḥ saṃkṣepāt tava yo mayā |
priyaḥ sa te 'stu satataṃ yathātmā satataṃ priyaḥ ||
priyaś ca yasya dharmaḥ syāt tasyaivātmā priyo 'rthataḥ |
priyasya ca hitaṃ kāryaṃ dharmād bhavati tat kṛtaṃ ||
bhajātmavad ato dharmaṃ pratipattiṃ ca dharmavat |
pratipattim iva prajñāṃ prajñām iva ca paṇḍitān ||
śaṃketa yaḥ svadaurātmyāt sa svakāryaṃ vināśayet ||
saṃtoṣaḥ karuṇā śīlaṃ prajñā ca kleśaśātanī ||
sarvasattvopajīvyaś ca bhava sarvajña eva ca ||
na kevalam ayaṃ dharmo rājña evopadiśyate |
imāṃ parikathāṃ rājan pratyahaṃ śrotum arhasi |
śīle gauravam uttamaṃ gurujane kṣāntiṃ tathānīrṣyatāṃ, mātsaryāpagamaṃ parārthadhanitāṃ kṛtvā nirāśatsatāṃ |
kṛcchrāpannahitā krayā sadasato saṃpragrahāpagrahau, saddharmasya parigrahaś ca satataṃ kāryo 'rthibhir bodhaye ||

div.p: puṇyajñānam hetu saugatakathā garbhāṃ priyāṃ dhāmatāṃ sambodhaiḥ parāmārtha saṃvṛtiguṇāṃ saddharmaratnāvalī yat puṇyaṃ vipulaṃ mayā jitam imāṃ tatyā vicintyāt na mānenedaṃ nikhilaṃ jagaccham sukhabauddhaṃ padaṃ prāpnuyāt

āryaratnāvalī nāma parikathā samāptāḥ || kṛtir iyam āryanāgājunapādānām iti || ye dharmā hetuprabhavā hetun || || teṣān tathāgato hy avadat tesāñ ca yo nirodha e || || vaṃvādī mahāśramaṇaḥ || deyadharmo 'yaṃ prava || || ramahāyānayāyina
